ideation: This sequence mimics the action of someone carefully rolling or handling an oil drum.  The robot will use both arms to simulate this action.  Since the robot has no hands, the 'grasping' will be implied by the arm positions.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the care needed when handling such an object. The first frame will show the arms positioned as if ready to grasp the drum. The second frame will depict the robot beginning to roll the drum, with one arm leading and the other supporting. The third frame will show the drum mid-roll, with both arms maintaining their positions. The fourth frame will show the robot finishing the roll, and finally, the fifth frame will return the arms to a neutral position.

frames.beat: arms ready to cradle the heavy drum
arms begin to carefully roll the drum forward
both arms maintain position, the drum keeps rolling
arms push the drum to its final resting place
arms return to rest, the drum is settled
